property.name: SearchEverywhereHistoryKey
property.value: database ACTION ActivateDatabaseToolWindow class diagram ACTION NewJavaDiagram

task.summary: added some JS to have beautiful maps and drawing tool
ddl for osm import to db
command objects for validating user inputs
javascripts for handling markers and features
reduced gsp, moved javascript to application.js
save and delete tracks and infos
some css for lightbox and modal behavior
some tags for showing, handling map layers
added 2 sims with 3 routes in bootstrap
added action to fill map with default routes
fixes and more info about car task
added different battery packs to select
added lightbox for car info during sim
fixed calc of current state and energy behavior
added gasoline stations for searching for energy
added limits when car is empty or looking for energy
added method for preparing routes to energy and back
added select energy drain to route info lightbox
added thread executor for bootstrap process
adding new route to energy and back to map
changed framework to work with threads per sim object
design improved for gasoline info lightbox
fixed destroy feature after polygon, independently of succes
removed route infos on select page
no preloading of default routes anymore
using jndi for prod and improved caching using ehcache
try using cache for osm graph
commited not used views, uncommited SimulationPreparator does't work without him
Server address is static in this case. if i take a dynamic address with grails tools i receive "lnv-89012.dfki.uni-sb.de:9090" instead of "emobilesim.dfki.de"
some css changes to addapt simulation time view

all in one paket
+ help with images + some extensions in domain model + some changes in distribution view
added following: 1. distribution 2. added new domain model 3. get data from sensors
added easygrid table view and export statistic in different types pdf, csv...

added easy grid to improve the statistic view and export statistic data in different formats At this moment it exists like an example and it's not fully integrated in the simulation.
Example: http://localhost:8081/emobilesim/author/classic Data from authors.txt. Controller: AuthorController Domain: Author

Merge branch 'feature_v_0.2' of https://github.com/andybuki/emobile into feature_v_0.2
# Conflicts: # grails-app/controllers/de/dfki/gs/controller/ms2/configuration/ConfigurationController.groovy
I need to configure my distrubution i revert the old version

Merge branch 'feature_v_0.2' of https://github.com/andybuki/emobile into feature_v_0.2
# Conflicts: # grails-app/views/configuration/index.gsp
new changes: partition fleets, routes, groups

MESSAGE.value:
all in one paket
+ help with images + some extensions in domain model + some changes in distribution view
added following: 1. distribution 2. added new domain model 3. get data from sensors
added easygrid table view and export statistic in different types pdf, csv...

added easy grid to improve the statistic view and export statistic data in different formats At this moment it exists like an example and it's not fully integrated in the simulation.
Example: http://localhost:8081/emobilesim/author/classic Data from authors.txt. Controller: AuthorController Domain: Author

Merge branch 'feature_v_0.2' of https://github.com/andybuki/emobile into feature_v_0.2
# Conflicts: # grails-app/controllers/de/dfki/gs/controller/ms2/configuration/ConfigurationController.groovy
I need to configure my distrubution i revert the old version

Merge branch 'feature_v_0.2' of https://github.com/andybuki/emobile into feature_v_0.2
# Conflicts: # grails-app/views/configuration/index.gsp
new changes: partition fleets, routes, groups
